section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports no pain with knee flexion and extension.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom status rather than an observed exam maneuver; while often documented under musculoskeletal exam, phrased as a patient report it more strictly belongs with symptom history.
This appears to be a patient-reported home glucose trend rather than an in-clinic lab or vital; as such it fits better under history of present illness/medication and disease control history.
